title: Elytrafy (No Star)
description: This mod will let you combine any armour piece with an elytra in a crafting table letting you have the protection of your armour with your elytra.
body:
# Elytrafy

This Mod will allow you to combine you elytra & any chestplate in a crafting table allowing you to be able to fly around with the protection of your chestplate.

![The Crafting Recipe For A Gliding Chestplate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ccb9ba2376ccd7223f055e86d891a5f6d4024293.png)

There is also a version that does need a nether star [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytrafy)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-Avv894lu80" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<details>
<summary>Known Problems</summary>

- Removes all enchantments

Submit any issues here: https://github.com/3rik11/elytrafy/issues
</details>
